entry.name: plan
entry.label: Subscription plan; drives the default token budgets.

entry.name: usageWindow
entry.label: Which window to show: "session" (5-hour block) or "weekly" (rolling 7 days).

entry.name: tokenLimit
entry.label: Token budget that represents a full bar for one 5-hour session.

entry.name: weeklyTokenLimit
entry.label: Token budget that represents a full bar over a rolling 7-day window.

entry.name: metric
entry.label: Which tokens to count: "billable" (input+output+cache writes) or "total".

entry.name: cornerRadius
entry.label: Corner radius of the bar in pixels (0 = square).

entry.name: borderWidth
entry.label: Bar border width in pixels (0 = no border).

entry.name: useThresholdColors
entry.label: Recolour the bar as it fills past warning/critical levels.

entry.name: warnThreshold
entry.label: Percentage at which the warning colour kicks in.

entry.name: critThreshold
entry.label: Percentage at which the critical colour kicks in.

entry.name: labelPosition
entry.label: Where to show the text label: "off", "onbar", "left" or "right".

entry.name: labelText
entry.label: Optional text shown before the percentage in the label.

entry.name: updateIntervalSec
entry.label: How often to refresh, in seconds.
